meta.title: Yunqi Meng
meta.description: 记录学习与生活的个人博客
meta.author: 孟俊澎

pages.title: 关于我
pages.text: 个人简介你好！欢迎来到我的个人博客。我是一名热爱技术的开发者，专注于前端开发和用户体验设计。 技术栈前端技术 HTML5 / CSS3 / JavaScript Vue.js / React TypeScript Tailwind CSS 后端技术 Node.js Python MySQL / MongoDB 工具与框架 Git / GitHub Webpack / Vite Docker 项目经历个人博客系统 基于 Hexo 框架搭建 使用 Butterfly 主题 部署在 GitHub Pages 支持深色模式、响应式设计 其他项目 （在此添加你的其他项目经历） 联系方式 GitHub: https://github.com/yunqi-meng Email: your-email@example.com 致谢感谢所有访问我博客的朋友，希望我的分享对你有所帮助！

/* build time:Sun Mar 22 2026 13:28:05 GMT+0800 (中国标准时间)*/ :root{--heo-primary:#425AEF;--heo-primary-hover:#3A4FE8;--heo-secondary:#FF6B6B;--heo-text:#1F2937;--heo-text-secondary:#6B7280;--heo-text-tertiary:#9CA3AF;--heo-bg:#FAFAFA;--heo-card:#FFFFFF;--heo-border:#E5E7EB;--heo-code:#F8F9FA;--heo-shadow-sm:0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);--heo-shadow-md:0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);--heo-shadow-lg:0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);--heo-shadow-hover:0 12px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);--heo-radius-sm:8px;--heo-radius-md:12px;--heo-radius-lg:16px;--heo-radius-xl:24px;--heo-transition-fast:0.2s ease;--heo-transition-normal:0.3s ease;--heo-transition-slow:0.5s ease}[data-theme=dark]{--heo-primary:#6B8CFF;--heo-primary-hover:#5A7AEF;--heo-secondary:#FF8A8A;--heo-text:#F3F4F6;--heo-text-secondary:#9CA3AF;--heo-text-tertiary:#6B7280;--heo-bg:#0D1117;--heo-card:#161B22;--heo-border:#30363D;--heo-code:#1C2128;--heo-shadow-sm:0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);--heo-shadow-md:0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);--heo-shadow-lg:0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);--heo-shadow-hover:0 12px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)}*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}html{scroll-behavior:smooth}body{font-family:Inter,'PingFang SC','Microsoft YaHei',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif!important;font-size:16px;line-height:1.8;color:var(--heo-text);background-color:var(--heo-bg);-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;-moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale}::selection{background:var(--heo-primary);color:#fff}::-webkit-scrollbar{width:8px;height:8px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:0 0}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--heo-border);border-radius:4px}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--heo-text-tertiary)}#nav{background:rgba(255,255,255,.8)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(20px)!important;-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px)!important;border-bottom:1px solid transparent!important;box-shadow:none!important;transition:all var(--heo-transition-normal)!important}[data-theme=dark] #nav{background:rgba(13,17,23,.8)!important}#nav.scrolled,#nav.visible{background:rgba(255,255,255,.95)!important;border-bottom-color:var(--heo-border)!important;box-shadow:var(--heo-shadow-sm)!important}[data-theme=dark] #nav.scrolled,[data-theme=dark] #nav.visible{background:rgba(22,27,34,.95)!important}#nav #blog-info{padding:0 24px}#nav .nav-site-title{font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--heo-text);text-decoration:none;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}#nav .site-icon{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%}#nav .site-name{color:var(--heo-text)}#nav #menus{padding:0 24px}#nav #menus .menus_items{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}#nav #menus .menus_item{position:relative}#nav #menus .menus_item a{padding:8px 16px;color:var(--heo-text-secondary);text-decoration:none;font-size:.95rem;font-weight:500;border-radius:var(--heo-radius-md);transition:all var(--heo-transition-fast);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}#nav #menus .menus_item a:hover{color:var(--heo-primary);background:rgba(66,90,239,.08)}#nav #menus .menus_item a.active{color:var(--heo-primary);background:rgba(66,90,239,.12)}#page-header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#667eea 0,#764ba2 100%)!important}#page-header::before{background:rgba(0,0,0,.2)!important}#site-info #site-title{font-size:3rem;font-weight:700;text-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}#scroll-down{animation:bounce 2s infinite}@keyframes bounce{0%,100%,20%,50%,80%{transform:translateY(0)}40%{transform:translateY(-10px)}60%{transform:translateY(-5px)}}#content-inner{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:40px 24px}#recent-posts{flex:1}.recent-post-item{background:var(--heo-card)!important;border-radius:var(--heo-radius-lg)!important;overflow:hidden!important;box-shadow:var(--heo-shadow-sm)!important;border:1px solid var(--heo-border)!important;transition:all var(--heo-transition-normal)!important;margin-bottom:24px!important;animation:fadeInUp .6s ease both}.recent-post-item:hover{transform:translateY(-4px)!important;box-shadow:var(--heo-shadow-hover)!important;border-color:transparent!important}.recent-post-item .post-cover{border-radius:var(--heo-radius-lg) var(--heo-radius-lg) 0 0!important;overflow:hidden}.recent-post-item .post-cover img{transition:transform var(--heo-transition-slow)!important}.recent-post-item:hover .post-cover img{transform:scale(1.05)!important}.recent-post-info{padding:24px!important}.recent-post-info .article-title{font-size:1.25rem!important;font-weight:600!important;color:var(--heo-text)!important;margin-bottom:12px!important;line-height:1.4!important;transition:color var(--heo-transition-fast)!important}.recent-post-item:hover .article-title{color:var(--heo-primary)!important}.recent-post-info .article-meta-wrap{color:var(--heo-text-tertiary)!important;font-size:.875rem!important;margin-bottom:12px!important}.recent-post-info .article-meta-wrap a,.recent-post-info .article-meta-wrap span{color:var(--heo-text-tertiary)!important}.recent-post-info .content{color:var(--heo-text-secondary)!important;font-size:.95rem!important;line-height:1.7!important;display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:3;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;overflow:hidden}#aside-content{width:300px}#aside-content .card-widget{background:var(--heo-card)!important;border-radius:var(--heo-radius-lg)!important;padding:24px!important;margin-bottom:24px!important;box-shadow:var(--heo-shadow-sm)!important;border:1px solid var(--heo-border)!important;animation:fadeInUp .6s ease both}#aside-content .card-widget .item-headline{font-size:1rem!important;font-weight:600!important;color:var(--heo-text)!important;margin-bottom:16px!important;padding-bottom:12px!important;border-bottom:1px solid var(--heo-border)!important}#aside-content .card-widget .item-headline i{color:var(--heo-primary)!important;margin-right:8px}#aside-content .card-info{text-align:center!important}#aside-content .card-info .avatar-img{margin-bottom:16px}#aside-content .card-info .avatar-img img{width:100px;height:100px;border-radius:50%;border:4px solid var(--heo-border);transition:all var(--heo-transition-normal)}#aside-content .card-info .avatar-img img:hover{transform:rotate(360deg) scale(1.1);border-color:var(--heo-primary)}#aside-content .card-info .author-info-name{font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--heo-text);margin-bottom:8px}#aside-content .card-info .author-info-description{color:var(--heo-text-secondary);font-size:.95rem;margin-bottom:20px}#aside-content .card-info .site-data{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:24px;margin-bottom:20px}#aside-content .card-info .site-data a{text-decoration:none;color:var(--heo-text)}#aside-content .card-info .site-data .card-info #card-info-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:10px 24px;background:var(--heo-primary);color:#fff;border-radius:20px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:500;font-size:.9rem;transition:all var(--heo-transition-fast)}#aside-content .card-info 14px;background:var(--heo-bg);border-radius:var(--heo-radius-md);color:var(--heo-text);text-decoration:none;font-size:.95rem;transition:all var(--heo-transition-fast)}#aside-content .card-archive-list .card-archive-list-link:hover{background:rgba(66,90,239,.08);color:var(--heo-primary)}#aside-content .card-archive-list .card-archive-list-count{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--heo-text-tertiary);background:var(--heo-border);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px}#aside-content .aside-list .aside-list-item{padding:12px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--heo-border)}#aside-content .aside-list .aside-list-item:last-child{border-bottom:none}#aside-content .aside-list .aside-list-item .content a:hover{color:var(--heo-primary)}#aside-content .aside-list .aside-list-item .content time{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--heo-text-tertiary)}#aside-content .card-webinfo .webinfo-item{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--heo-border)}#aside-content .card-webinfo .webinfo-item:last-child{border-bottom:none}#aside-content .card-webinfo .item-name{color:var(--heo-text-secondary);font-size:.9rem}#aside-content .card-webinfo .item-count{font-weight:600;color:var(--heo-primary)}#aside-content #card-toc .toc-content{font-size:.9rem}#aside-content #card-toc .toc-content .toc-item{margin-bottom:8px}#aside-content #card-toc .toc-content .toc-link{display:block;padding:6px 12px;color:var(--heo-text-secondary);text-decoration:none;border-radius:var(--heo-radius-sm);transition:all var(--heo-transition-fast);border-left:2px solid transparent}#aside-content #card-toc .toc-content .toc-link:hover{color:var(--heo-primary);background:rgba(66,90,239,.08)}#aside-content #card-toc .toc-content .toc-link.active{color:var(--heo-primary);background:rgba(66,90,239,.12);border-left-color:var(--heo-primary)}#post{background:var(--heo-card);border-radius:var(--heo-radius-lg);padding:48px;box-shadow:var(--heo-shadow-sm);border:1px solid var(--heo-border)}#post-info .post-title{font-size:2.25rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}#article-container{font-size:1.05rem;line-height:1.8;color:var(--heo-text)}#article-container h1,#article-container h2,#article-container h3,#article-container h4,#article-container h5,#article-container h6{color:var(--heo-text);margin-top:2.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;font-weight:600;line-height:1.4}#article-container h1{font-size:1.875rem}#article-container h2{font-size:1.5rem;padding-bottom:.5rem;border-bottom:2px solid var(--heo-primary)}#article-container h3{font-size:1.25rem}#article-container p{margin-bottom:1.5rem}#article-container a{color:var(--heo-primary);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid transparent;transition:border-color var(--heo-transition-fast)}#article-container a:hover{border-bottom-color:var(--heo-primary)}#article-container img{max-width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:var(--heo-radius-lg);margin:2rem 0;box-shadow:var(--heo-shadow-md);cursor:zoom-in;transition:all var(--heo-transition-normal)}#article-container img:hover{box-shadow:var(--heo-shadow-lg)}#article-container pre{background:var(--heo-code);border-radius:var(--heo-radius-md);padding:20px;overflow-x:auto;margin:1.5rem 0;border:1px solid var(--heo-border)}#article-container code{font-family:'JetBrains Mono','Fira Code',Consolas,Monaco,monospace;font-size:.9em}#article-container p code{background:var(--heo-code);padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;color:var(--heo-secondary)}#article-container pre code{background:0 0;padding:0;color:inherit}#article-container blockquote{margin:1.5rem 0;padding:16px 24px;background:rgba(66,90,239,.05);border-left:4px solid var(--heo-primary);border-radius:0 var(--heo-radius-md) var(--heo-radius-md) 0;color:var(--heo-text-secondary)}#article-container blockquote p{margin-bottom:0}.post-copyright{margin-top:48px;padding:24px;background:rgba(66,90,239,.05);border-radius:var(--heo-radius-md);border:1px solid rgba(66,90,239,.15)}.post-copyright .post-copyright-meta{color:var(--heo-text-secondary);font-weight:500}.post-copyright .post-copyright-info a{color:var(--heo-primary)}#pagination{display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:48px}#pagination .extend,#pagination .page-number{min-width:40px;height:40px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:var(--heo-card);border:1px solid var(--heo-border);border-radius:var(--heo-radius-md);color:var(--heo-text-secondary);text-decoration:none;font-size:.95rem;transition:all var(--heo-transition-fast)}#pagination .extend:hover,#pagination .page-number:hover{background:var(--heo-primary);color:#fff;border-color:var(--heo-primary)}#pagination .page-number.current{background:var(--heo-primary);color:#fff;border-color:var(--heo-primary)}#footer{background:var(--heo-card);border-top:1px solid var(--heo-border);padding:48px 24px;margin-top:80px}#footer .footer-copyright{text-align:center;color:var(--heo-text-tertiary);font-size:.9rem}#footer a{color:var(--heo-primary);text-decoration:none}#rightside{z-index:999}#rightside>div>button{width:48px;height:48px;background:var(--heo-card);border:1px solid var(--heo-border);border-radius:50%;color:var(--heo-text);font-size:1.1rem;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:var(--heo-shadow-md);transition:all var(--heo-transition-normal);margin-bottom:12px}#rightside>div>button:hover{background:var(--heo-primary);color:#fff;border-color:var(--heo-primary);transform:translateY(-2px)}#rightside #go-up{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transform:translateY(20px);transition:all var(--heo-transition-normal)}#rightside #go-up.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;transform:translateY(0)}#rightside #darkmode{background:var(--heo-primary);color:#fff;border-color:var(--heo-primary)}#rightside #darkmode:hover{background:var(--heo-primary-hover);transform:rotate(180deg)}@keyframes fadeInUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}.lightbox-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.9);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:9999;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s ease}.lightbox-overlay.show{opacity:1}.lightbox-container{position:relative;max-width:90vw;max-height:90vh}.lightbox-container img{max-width:100%;max-height:90vh;border-radius:var(--heo-radius-lg);box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}.lightbox-close{position:absolute;top:-48px;right:0;width:40px;height:40px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:none;border-radius:50%;color:#fff;font-size:1.25rem;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s ease}.lightbox-close:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);transform:rotate(90deg)}@media (max-width:1024px){#content-inner{flex-direction:column}#aside-content{width:100%}}@media (max-width:768px){#nav #menus{display:none}#site-info #site-title{font-size:2rem}#post{padding:24px}#content-inner{padding:24px 16px}.recent-post-info{padding:20px!important}.recent-post-info .article-title{font-size:1.1rem!important}#aside-content .card-widget{padding:20px!important}}@media (max-width:480px){#post-info .post-title{font-size:1.5rem}#article-container h1{font-size:1.5rem}#article-container h2{font-size:1.25rem}#article-container h3{font-size:1.1rem}} /* rebuild by neat */

(function() { 'use strict'; const HeoBlog = { init: function() { this.initNavigation(); this.initScrollEffects(); this.initDarkMode(); this.initBackToTop(); this.initSearch(); this.initTOC(); this.initLazyLoad(); this.initImageLightbox(); this.initAnimations(); }, initNavigation: function() { const nav = document.getElementById('nav'); const navToggle = document.querySelector('.nav-toggle'); const navMenu = document.querySelector('.nav-menu'); if (navToggle && navMenu) { navToggle.addEventListener('click', function() { navMenu.classList.toggle('show'); this.classList.toggle('active'); }); document.addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (!nav.contains(e.target)) { navMenu.classList.remove('show'); navToggle.classList.remove('active'); } }); } document.querySelectorAll('.nav-menu a').forEach(function(link) { link.addEventListener('click', function() { if (navMenu) { navMenu.classList.remove('show'); } if (navToggle) { navToggle.classList.remove('active'); } }); }); }, initScrollEffects: function() { const nav = document.getElementById('nav'); let lastScrollY = 0; let ticking = false; function updateNav() { const scrollY = window.scrollY; if (nav) { if (scrollY > 50) { nav.classList.add('scrolled'); } else { nav.classList.remove('scrolled'); } } lastScrollY = scrollY; ticking = false; } window.addEventListener('scroll', function() { if (!ticking) { requestAnimationFrame(updateNav); ticking = true; } }); }, initDarkMode: function() { const toggle = document.querySelector('.darkmode-toggle'); const prefersDark = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)'); function setTheme(theme) { document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', theme); localStorage.setItem('theme', theme); updateToggleIcon(theme); } function updateToggleIcon(theme) { if (!toggle) return; const icon = toggle.querySelector('i'); if (icon) { if (theme === 'dark') { icon.className = 'fas fa-sun'; } else { icon.className = 'fas fa-moon'; } } } function toggleTheme() { const currentTheme = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme'); const newTheme = currentTheme === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark'; setTheme(newTheme); } const savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('theme'); if (savedTheme) { setTheme(savedTheme); } else if (prefersDark.matches) { setTheme('dark'); } if (toggle) { toggle.addEventListener('click', toggleTheme); } prefersDark.addEventListener('change', function(e) { if (!localStorage.getItem('theme')) { setTheme(e.matches ? 'dark' : 'light'); } }); }, initBackToTop: function() { const goUp = document.getElementById('go-up'); if (!goUp) return; function updateGoUp() { if (window.scrollY > 300) { goUp.classList.add('visible'); } else { goUp.classList.remove('visible'); } } window.addEventListener('scroll', function() { requestAnimationFrame(updateGoUp); }); goUp.addEventListener('click', function() { window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }); }); }, initSearch: function() { const searchBtn = document.querySelector('.search-btn'); const searchDialog = document.getElementById('search-dialog'); const searchInput = document.querySelector('.search-input'); const searchClose = document.querySelector('.search-close'); if (!searchDialog) return; if (searchBtn) { searchBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { searchDialog.classList.add('show'); if (searchInput) { setTimeout(function() { searchInput.focus(); }, 100); } }); } if (searchClose) { searchClose.addEventListener('click', function() { searchDialog.classList.remove('show'); }); } searchDialog.addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (e.target === searchDialog) { searchDialog.classList.remove('show'); } }); document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) { if (e.key === 'Escape' && searchDialog.classList.contains('show')) { searchDialog.classList.remove('show'); } }); }, initTOC: function() { const tocLinks = document.querySelectorAll('#toc .toc-content a'); const headings = document.querySelectorAll('.post-content h1, .post-content h2, .post-content h3'); if (tocLinks.length === 0 || headings.length === 0) return; function updateActiveLink() { const scrollY = window.scrollY; let activeId = null; headings.forEach(function(heading) { const rect = heading.getBoundingClientRect(); if (rect.top

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
